---
title: "Satvik Raman"
about:
    id: hero-heading
    template: trestles
    image: /assets/profile/satvik_photo_20230101.jpg
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 14em
    links:
        - icon: github
          text: GitHub
          href: https://github.com/satvikraman
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/satvik-raman-bb3841407
        - icon: envelope
          text: Email
          href: mailto:satvikraman11@gmail.com
format:
    html:
        page-layout: full
lightbox: auto
---

:::{#hero-heading}
I am a Grade 12 student at Sri Kumaran's Children's Home School, Bengaluru, with a passion for economics and mathematics. My desire to understand how businesses operate and how financial systems shape our world drives my academic journey. I intend to pursue these fields at the undergraduate level and build my career around them.

I believe in applying what I learn to the real world. I have been programming since my sixth grade and frequently build automations to streamline tasks and aid decision-making. I am deeply committed to social equity. Inspired by my upbringing in a polyglot family, my community service focuses on breaking down language and economic barriers, using technology, to create equal opportunities for underserved groups.

Sports is equally central to my identity. I have represented my school in football and table tennis at the state and national level CBSE cluster tournaments. I have also played club-level football for the last three years with Young Blue Elite FC [Bengaluru FC Soccer School](https://www.instagram.com/bfcsoccerschools/?hl=en){target="_blank"}, across their U17, U18, and U19 teams.

Sports has taught me to value discipline, dedication, teamwork, and strategic thinking. I do my best to cross-pollinate these learnings for my academic and personal growth.
:::

::: {.content-section}

## Education

::: {.education-entry}
[**Sri Kumaran's Children's Home School**]{.school-name} · Bengaluru, India

[Grade 12 · CBSE]{.school-detail}
:::

## Awards & Recognitions

::: {.achievements-grid}

::: {.achievement-card}
[2020]{.year-badge}

#### State CBSE Clusters TT Tournament — Runners Up

Represented school at the state level CBSE clusters competition.

![](/assets/profile/TT-State-2020-2nd.jpeg){group="awards" .achievement-thumb}
:::

::: {.achievement-card}
[2019]{.year-badge}

#### Google Code To Learn — Winner

Created an Android application. [Video demo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2hzPp6bmkQ){target="_blank"}

![](/assets/profile/Google-Code-To-Learn.jpeg){group="awards" .achievement-thumb}
:::

::: {.achievement-card}
[2020]{.year-badge}

#### National CBSE Clusters TT Tournament

Represented school at the national level. The competition was held in Noorpur, Uttar Pradesh.

![](/assets/profile/TT-National-2019-Paticipation.jpeg){group="awards" .achievement-thumb}
:::

::: {.achievement-card}
[2019]{.year-badge}

#### State CBSE Clusters TT Tournament — Winner

Won the state level competition and was selected to compete at the national level.

![](/assets/profile/TT-State-2019-1st.jpeg){group="awards" .achievement-thumb}
:::

:::

## Certifications

::: {.achievements-grid}

::: {.achievement-card}
[2023]{.year-badge}

#### German A2

Cleared the A2 level German language proficiency test.

![](/assets/profile/German-A2.jpeg){group="certs" .achievement-thumb}
:::

::: {.achievement-card}
[2022]{.year-badge}

#### German A1

Cleared the A1 level German language proficiency test.

![](/assets/profile/German-A1.jpeg){group="certs" .achievement-thumb}
:::

:::

:::
